reviews.comment:
La estacion y playa en general bien, ahora la señora del shop, desagradable su atención al público, mala contestación y predisposición.

(Translated by Google)
The station and beach were generally fine, but the lady in the shop was unpleasant to work with, giving rude answers and lacking a positive attitude.
